overview: SynergenX provides customized testosterone replacement therapy (TRT), hormone replacement therapy (HRT), weight loss therapy, and peptide services. All care is tailored to each patient's individual hormone levels and symptoms and is supervised by board-certified professionals.
highlights: Customized hormone therapy tailored to individual hormone levels
Bioidentical hormone replacement (BHRT) with estrogen, progesterone, and testosterone
Medically supervised GLP-1 weight loss therapy
targetAudience: Men seeking testosterone optimization and women managing menopause or perimenopause, as well as individuals interested in medically supervised weight loss.
